steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Add the two equations to eliminate $y$: $$(3y)+(-3y)=(7x+14)+(8x-26) \implies 0=15x-12.$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Solve for $15x$: $15x=12$. Multiply both sides by 4: $$60x=48.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches the correct answer, 48. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so D is correct.
